name: SF VIBE FEST 2027
thesis: Fog City Futurism — a love letter to San Francisco disguised as an operating system for the future.
dos: editorial serif as the lead voice — Playfair Display in display sizes, Cormorant for quotes
warm grain across every surface — punk Xerox / halftone lineage
electric blue as the AI / signal discord against warm cream
data is sourced and visually separated from projections
every section has one human or place anchor
use the canonical signature lines verbatim
SF VIBE FEST in caps; sentence case inside the editorial flow
donts: no Burning Man cosplay or cliché
no SaaS sterility or fake utopian AI gloss
